org.apache.paimon.utils

Class ObjectsFile<T>

  • java.lang.Object
    • org.apache.paimon.utils.ObjectsFile<T>
  • Direct Known Subclasses:
    IndexManifestFile, ManifestFile, ManifestList

    public abstract class ObjectsFile<T>
extends Object
    A file which contains several Ts, provides read and write.
